metadata.description: Centralized AI toolbox: shared agents, pipeline skills, enforcement hooks, and the Slack bridge MCP server for development teams.

plugins.name: team-workflow
plugins.description: Triage + orchestrator agents, pipeline skills (/task, /worktree, /commit, /review, /pr, /ship, /sync-docs) and enforcement hooks.

plugins.name: slack-bridge
plugins.description: Slack bridge MCP server: subscribe to channels, claim and reply to messages, read threads via daemon + MCP architecture.

plugins.name: scaffold
plugins.description: Scaffolding and validation for Claude Code agents, skills, and MCP servers. Ships /new-agent, /new-skill, /new-mcp generators and /audit-agent, /audit-skill, /audit-mcp validators, backed by canonical best-practice references.
